vocab.meaning: thả mình vào giấc ngủ (nhờ âm thanh)
vocab.example: I find the sound of a steady downpour incredibly soothing; it helps me drift off in no time.

vocab.meaning: vang lên mạnh mẽ, rõ ràng
vocab.example: There is something magical about hearing church bells ring out across a quiet valley on a Sunday morning.

vocab.meaning: át đi, lấn át (âm thanh khó chịu)
vocab.example: I love playing white noise to drown out the relentless hum of the city traffic outside my window.

vocab.meaning: len lỏi, truyền qua (âm thanh từ xa hoặc qua vật cản)
vocab.example: The faint sound of birdsong filtering through the morning mist is my favorite way to start the day.

vocab.meaning: kích hoạt, gợi lên (một cảm xúc hoặc phản ứng)
vocab.example: The crisp sound of autumn leaves crunching underfoot always sets off a feeling of nostalgia for my childhood.

vocab.meaning: nhỏ dần rồi tắt hẳn, lắng xuống
vocab.example: I enjoy the stillness of the countryside once the evening breeze begins to die down and everything goes quiet.

vocab.meaning: thả hồn theo mây gió, không chú ý xung quanh (do âm thanh thư giãn)
vocab.example: Listening to the rhythmic bubbling of a brook allows me to completely zone out and forget my daily stressors.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu phát ra âm thanh (thường là tiếng chim hoặc nhạc công)
vocab.example: It’s delightful when the morning chorus of birds starts to pipe up just as the sun begins to rise.

vocab.meaning: trở nên tươi tỉnh, phấn chấn (khi nghe thấy âm thanh ưa thích)
vocab.example: My ears always perk up when I hear the distant melody of a street performer playing the violin.
I’ve always been fascinated by the way a shout can echo back from the walls of a deep canyon.
